subject: [PATCH v6 20/22] swapfile: replace the swap map with bitmaps

2026-05-05.patch_summary: This patch replaces the swap map in Linux's swapfile code with two bitmaps, one for tracking allocated states and another for bad states. This change is made possible by moving the swap count state to the virtual swap layer, which reduces the number of bits required per swap entry from 6 to 1. The patch updates the swap_info_struct structure in include/linux/swap.h and modifies several functions in mm/swapfile.c to use the new bitmap-based approach.
